description: T650 CanvaTextElementFetcher MUST resolve ICanvaFabric from factory at ORDER 1. Zero direct SDK imports. SDK abstraction enforced — provider swap via FREEDOM config.

description: T650 CanvaTextElementFetcher MUST validate element type is TEXT at ORDER 1. Unknown types return ElementTypeMismatch without attempting fetch. Element fetched from Canva via fabric, returning complete text properties.
blockConditions: T650 fetches non-TEXT element types (IMAGE, SHAPE) without validation

Unknown type silently returns null instead of error
passConditions: T650 validates elementType = 'TEXT' at ORDER 1

Complete element properties (text, font, color, bounds) fetched via ICanvaFabric

description: T650 CanvaTextElementFetcher MUST emit TextElementFetched CloudEvent with elementId, canvasId, textContent, fontFamily, fontSize, color, bounds. Event includes tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage.

description: T650 CanvaTextElementFetcher MUST validate canvasId belongs to current tenant at ORDER 1. Cross-tenant element access forbidden. tenantId sourced from AsyncLocalStorage only — never from request.
